Class GraphPreconditions

java.lang.Object
io.graphite.validation.GraphPreconditions
public final class GraphPreconditions extends Object
Provides reusable precondition checks for graph algorithms.

GraphPreconditions centralizes validation logic that verifies algorithm requirements before execution. These checks ensure that graphs satisfy the structural constraints expected by individual algorithms, resulting in consistent error reporting throughout the library.

Supported Validations

  • Null graph validation
  • Directed and undirected graph requirements
  • Connected graph verification
  • Weighted graph verification
  • Negative edge detection
  • Vertex index validation

Implementation Notes

This class contains only static utility methods and cannot be instantiated.

Since:
2.0
Version:
2.0
Author:
Chinmay
